commit.message:
refactor: extract inline styles to CSS classes per code review

- Add .gs-topbar-select for currency select styling
- Add .gs-search-icon-btns and .gs-search-icon-btn for search inner buttons
- Add .gs-action-user-icon for header user icon sizing
- Add .badge-ranking for gold-themed ranking product badges
- Add .gs-cat-link--featured and .gs-cat-sidebar-item--featured for highlighted nav items
- Add .gs-footer-logo for footer brand name
- Add .gs-section--alt for alternate background sections
- Add .gs-footer-payments-title for payments section sub-heading
- Replace all corresponding inline styles in index.html with these classes

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: nusratneela101 <112537662+nusratneela101@users.noreply.github.com>

Redesign homepage with Alibaba-style layout

- Replace hero with 3-panel layout: category sidebar, frequently searched + savings bonanza center, hot picks right panel
- Add trust/guarantee section (GlobexSky Guaranteed) after hero
- Replace products section with horizontally scrollable Top Deals cards (product-card-v2)
- Add Top Ranking section with category tabs and ranked product grid
- Replace suppliers section with Tailored Selections grid (daily picks)
- Add promotional banner (€10 off every €100) before livestream section
- Replace footer with enhanced 5-column Alibaba-style footer with app download row, payment badges, sister sites
- Add category dropdown button and search mode tabs to navbar
- Style search submit button in GlobexSky orange
- Append all new CSS to main.css (no existing styles removed)
- Add JS: initSearchTabs, initCatSidebar, initTopDealsScroll, initRankingTabs, initDealsCountdown
- All existing sections, nav controls, aria attributes, and door animation preserved

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: nusratneela101 <112537662+nusratneela101@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: implement Alibaba-style redesign of homepage frontend

- Add GS design tokens (--gs-primary, --gs-secondary, etc.) to main.css :root
- Update btn-primary, btn-register, btn-flash-sale to use --gs-primary (#FF6A00)
- Update hero background to light/orange gradient
- Update product-price-current to --gs-primary
- Update supplier-verified to --gs-success
- Update section-title with orange left-border accent
- Update site-footer to use --gs-bg-dark (#191919)
- Create assets/css/alibaba-design.css with full Alibaba-style component library:
  - Top info bar (gs-topbar)
  - Sticky header with logo, search tabs, action buttons (gs-header)
  - Category navigation bar (gs-category-nav)
  - Hero with sidebar + banner slider + sub-banners (gs-hero)
  - Trust badges section (gs-trust)
  - Flash sale with scrollable items and progress bars (gs-flash-sale)
  - Product cards with hover actions/wishlist (gs-products-grid)
  - Supplier cards (gs-suppliers-grid)
  - How it works steps (gs-steps)
  - Newsletter section (gs-newsletter)
  - 5-column footer with social/payments (gs-footer)
  - Full responsive breakpoints (1200/768/480px)
- Rewrite index.html with complete Alibaba-style layout:
  - Topbar, sticky header, category nav, hero with 3-slide auto-playing banner
  - Trust badges, flash sale with countdown timer
  - 10 frequently searched products + 5 top ranking products
  - 4 featured suppliers, how-it-works section
  - Newsletter signup, 5-column footer
  - Banner slider JS, flash countdown JS, search tab JS
  - All existing scripts preserved (door animation, cart, auth, AI widget)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Make planner recipe cards clickable links to recipe detail

Wrap the image + title portion of each meal slot recipe card in a
<Link> pointing to /recipe/:id. The X remove button remains outside
the link so both interactions work independently.

Applies to both the desktop grid and the mobile stack layouts.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Switch planner layout breakpoint from lg to xl (1024→1280px)

7-column grid + sidebar needs more horizontal room. Moving the
desktop/mobile switch to xl prevents column overlap and card
overflow at intermediate window sizes (1024–1279px).

commit.message:
fix: typed CRUD, analysis persistence, BandoRadar sync, anti-hallucination

- Fix all skills to use proper DB types (alerts: type→alert_type, message→description,
  add trigger_date/contract_id; bandi: source_id→external_id, remove raw_data, add company_id)
- Add sync_metadata table type to database.ts (regenerated from Supabase)
- Persist full analysis results: ai_confidence, ai_summary, language, risk JSON in notes
- New BandoRadar SSE sync endpoint (POST /api/bandi/sync) with child_process skill execution
- Strengthen anti-hallucination: 8 rules in chat, explicit empty-data handling in orchestrator
- Registration documents auto-create contract records in documents route
- Docker build context → repo root for skills access in container
- Fix Campo Dati extraction: strip markdown table headers, reject known artifacts

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Handle all 21 form questions: add new fields, fix option text, add scale support

- config.yaml: Set real form URL, add all 21 question definitions with exact
  form option text, add education/employment/risk_agreement/trust/happiness
  fields to matrix profiles, fix income/first_invest/risk/drop option text
- bot.py: Use data-value XPath for radio clicks, add _click_scale_radio for
  linear scale questions scoped by entry_id, add fill methods for all new
  questions, add XPath quote escaping
- matrix.py: Add generators for education, employment, risk_agreement,
  financial literacy quiz (3 Qs correlated with literacy_mean), social trust,
  financial trust, happiness, life satisfaction

Fix mobile blue flash on dropdown menu tap (#6)

* Initial plan

* Fix mobile blue flash on dropdown menu, hamburger, close button, and FAQ items

- Wrap hover-only effects in @media (hover: hover) so they never fire on touch
- Add :focus/:active resets for hamburger and close buttons

fix: picker drawer overlap with single result

Float truncation in overlay.rs: (72.8 / 18.2) as usize = 3 instead
of 4 due to f32 precision loss from subtraction (panel_bottom -
panel_top). This made available_lines=3, num_visible=0, causing the
status line and result to render at the same y coordinate.

Fix: round to nearest integer instead of truncating.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: indexer never writes files, vault-wide block ID uniqueness

Remove block ID assignment from the indexer thread — it was writing
directly to disk via atomic_write(), bypassing the self-write hash
guard and causing false reload prompts.

Block IDs are now assigned only when a file is open in the editor,
via ensure_block_ids() on Insert→Normal transitions. Files without
IDs are indexed as-is.

Also adds vault-wide collision avoidance:
- BloomEditor.known_block_ids cache, refreshed on IndexComplete
- compute_block_id_assignments() accepts optional known IDs set
- New IDs inserted into cache immediately on assignment

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
refactor: centralize autosave as debounced timer

Replace 4 scattered autosave_if_dirty() calls with a single
schedule_autosave() at the end of handle_key(). Uses buffer's
existing is_dirty() (version != clean_version) to detect mutations.

- handle_key() = handle_key_inner() + schedule_autosave()
- 300ms debounce: rapid edits/undo/redo coalesce into one save
- Insert mode suppressed (fires on Insert→Normal transition)
- save_page() clears deadline to prevent redundant flush
- Removes undo/redo-specific deadline special cases

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: suppress false reload prompts during undo/redo

Two-part fix for file watcher echoing our own saves back as external
changes:

1. Content-hash self-write detection: hash every save, suppress watcher
   events whose disk content matches a stored hash (bounded deque of 8).

2. Undo/redo autosave debounce: set 300ms deadline instead of saving
   immediately, coalescing rapid undo sequences into a single write.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: undo delta persistence with keyframe support

Store EditDelta (offset, delete_len, insert_text) per undo node instead
of full buffer content. Every 50th node stores a keyframe (full text)
bounding chain length. BFS restore on load reconstructs Ropey structural
sharing. Backward compatible with existing all-content format.

Storage: ~25 MB → ~540 KB for reference vault (20 pages × 500 nodes).

Also adds lab design docs for block ID metadata and undo delta stress
testing (18 correctness scenarios, 5 failure modes).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
